summary: This is a brief announcement post directing readers to Joel's 'Ask Joel' column where he answers reader questions. The questions cover topics including learning C++ programming, tech companies in New York, Fog Creek's shrink-wrap software strategy, and Microsoft's use of Visual SourceSafe. The post is essentially a teaser with no substantive content of its own.
key_points: The post is a link/teaser to Joel's Q&A column 'Ask Joel'
Reader questions span education, NYC tech scene, business strategy, and development tools
No substantive arguments or insights are made in this particular post
key_insight: This is a navigational post pointing readers to Joel's Q&A column rather than a standalone essay with its own argument.
